title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Two Lovers in the Reed Bed
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Two Lovers in the Reed Bed.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Two Lovers in the Reed Bed.

translation.text: From 'Two Lovers in the Reed Bed': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
